body.md: Mark the object **only when it is specific** — ‘the book’, a named thing. An indefinite object stays bare: *Kitap okudum* (I read a book) vs *Kitabı okudum* (I read **the** book).
Buffer **-y-** after a vowel (*kapı-yı*). Softening applies (*kitab-ı*). Proper nouns take an **apostrophe**: *Ali'yi, İstanbul'u*.

body.gloss: I read the book — definite, so -ı (and p→b)
I saw Ali — buffer -y- after a vowel, apostrophe on the name
